scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c gray,cyan "npm run dev -w @ai-interview/server" "npm run dev -w @ai-interview/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-interview/web && npm run build -w @ai-interview/server
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,web "npm run start -w @ai-interview/server" "npm run start -w @ai-interview/web"
